data.body:
## Research Findings (2026-03-25 session)

### MCP Sub-Agent Status: BROKEN (do not adopt)
mcpServers frontmatter for custom/plugin agents is documented but broken in practice:
- github.com/anthropics/claude-code issues #25200, #13898, #29655, #13605 (all open)
- Plugin agents explicitly cannot use mcpServers (field ignored for security)
- Silent hallucination on failure — no error, just wrong output
- Zero confirmed working real-world examples on GitHub

### Viable MCP Servers (orchestrator-level calls only)
1. mcp-server-tree-sitter (pip install) — AST-aware Python/JS/Bash symbol search, find_usage, get_dependencies. 12+ languages.
2. CodeSearch MCP (coa-codesearch) — 25 languages including Bash, Lucene indexing, find_references + trace_call_path. Requires .NET 9.
3. Claude Context (Zilliz) — semantic/conceptual search via BM25+vector hybrid. Requires OpenAI API key.
4. Code Pathfinder — deep Python call graph analysis (Python-only).

### Recommended Pattern
MCP at orchestrator level for enumeration ("find all references to X") — single tool call, structured JSON, <1s latency. Reserve Explore sub-agents for analytical reasoning. Hybrid: tree-sitter for structured code + Grep for config/docs/YAML.

### Key Gap
No tool handles cross-boundary references (YAML key → shell function → Python module). All tools treat files in isolation.
